title: research-atlas: a reconciled graph of the global research economy (funding + output)
description: research-atlas ingests the world's public research funding and output into one normalized, validated graph and publishes it as open, citable datasets. This release reconciles 958,000+ grants from NIH, NSF, the European Commission (CORDIS), UKRI, plus Gates, Wellcome, Sloan and DFG (2015-2025) into a Funder -> Grant -> Organization (ROR) -> Person (ORCID) -> Work (OpenAlex/DOI) -> Field graph: ~8.1M rows, recipient organizations merged on ROR, investigators on ORCID, and 285,604 grant-to-output acknowledgement edges. A connector framework, a 39-check validation suite, and a reproducible analysis pipeline are included, along with the first metascience study built on the graph (the structure of public research funding, 2015-2025). MIT licensed; data CC-BY-4.0.
